name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate payment reminders and processing instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Late payments leading to cash flow gaps.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payments leading to cash flow gaps.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate payment reminders and processing instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of payments and reminders.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate payment reminders and processing instead of manual tracking.
